hero_subhead: Home bakers, frozen food sellers, fashion and beauty brands — if you're taking 20+ orders a week on WhatsApp, you're already losing some to missed chats and payment chaos. Kedaipal turns your product catalog into a real storefront and order pipeline, through the WhatsApp your customers already use.
hero_trust: 14-day free trial · No credit card · No Meta setup · Live in 5 minutes
hero_phone_alt: WhatsApp chat leading to a Kedaipal storefront and an order confirmation
problem_heading: If you're selling on WhatsApp, you're probably losing more than you think.
problem_1_body: A customer messages on Monday about an order. You scroll past it chasing 30 other chats. By Friday they've bought from someone else. You never even saw it.
problem_2_body: "Dah transfer" — but the screenshot never came. You're DMing customers to confirm, they're slow to reply, and you can't pack the order until you're sure. That's 20 minutes per order, every order.
problem_3_title: No system when orders pile up
problem_3_body: Orders trickle in all week across chats, voice notes, and screenshots. When it's time to pack, you're guessing quantities from memory. Wrong guess = wasted stock or disappointed customers.
setup_heading: Your store is one step away.
setup_sub: Sign up, name your store, and you're live at your own link. Add products whenever you're ready.
setup_step_1_body: Sign up with email or Google. Takes about 30 seconds.
setup_step_2_body: One field. Pick a name and kedaipal.com/your-slug is live instantly — no config, no template, no code.
setup_step_3_body: Upload your catalog, add your contact WhatsApp number, and start taking real orders.
how_heading: From WhatsApp chat to confirmed order in four steps.
how_sub: From the first message to a paid order. The same flow handles the customer who buys in 5 minutes and the one who takes 2 weeks.
how_1_body: They message Kedaipal's shared WhatsApp number — the same channel they use every day. No app install needed.
how_2_body: A tap on a CTA button opens your hosted Kedaipal shop — no app install.
how_3_body: Browse, pick variants, add to cart on a mobile-first store that actually feels good.
how_4_body: Cart handoff posts back to WhatsApp with an order ID. You get status updates automatically.
features_heading: One hub for every channel you sell on.
features_sub: No enterprise bloat. No ten-seat minimum. Just the tools small retailers need to run a clean operation — all working from day one.
feature_1_body: Your logo, your slug, your currency. A professional mobile-first shop at kedaipal.com/your-slug — no code, no design skills needed.
feature_2_body: Customisable templates in English and Bahasa Malaysia. Your store name, your tone — sent automatically at every order step.
feature_3_body: Every order, every status, live. Powered by Convex so changes propagate instantly.
feature_4_body: Stock tracked per variant — decrements on order, low-stock alerts before you oversell. Made-to-order products keep selling past zero.
feature_5_body: Confirmed, packed, shipped, delivered — customers get a WhatsApp message at every step, automatically.
feature_6_body: Bank transfer, DuitNow, TNG e-wallet. Add your account details and QR code once — customers get payment instructions with every order confirmation.
feature_7_body: Save quotes. Set reminders. Re-engage a 2-week-old conversation in two taps. The customers who take longer to decide become customers who actually buy.
feature_8_title: Variants, like the marketplaces do it
feature_8_body: Sell one listing in every size and flavour. Each variant carries its own price, stock, photo and SKU — buyers pick with simple pill buttons, and sold-out combos grey out. Up to 2 option types and 50 combinations, same as Shopee and TikTok Shop.
feature_9_body: Custom cakes or printing? Send a mockup over WhatsApp and the buyer approves it right on their tracking page. Production stays locked until they sign off — no more remaking the wrong thing.
slow_yes_heading: Most customers don't buy on the first message. Kedaipal is built for that.
slow_yes_sub: Whether it's a bulk order, a pre-order cake, or a gear purchase — customers ask, go quiet, and come back later. With Kedaipal, every conversation is one tap away, with full history. The slow customers become closed sales, not lost ones.
slow_yes_1_title: Save a quote, follow up later
slow_yes_1_body: Send a price, save it as a parked order, set a reminder. The customer who said "I'll think about it" gets a friendly nudge in 3 days — automatically.
slow_yes_2_body: One tap on a customer name shows their full inquiry history, what they asked about, what they almost bought. No more "wait, who is this again?"
slow_yes_3_body: Your inbox forgets. Your dashboard doesn't. Every parked quote, every "let me check stock", every "I'll come by Saturday" — surfaced when it matters.
proof_label: Built for the way you actually sell
proof_disclaimer: Testimonials below are placeholders — real Founding 10 quotes land here as members onboard.
testimonial_1_quote: Cut my order admin time by half. No more 'eh, what was your order again?' messages — that alone is worth it.
testimonial_2_quote: Customers love that they don't need to install anything. They just tap the link and buy.
testimonial_3_quote: The WhatsApp handoff is the killer feature. Felt like magic the first time I used it.
founding_ten_heading: The first 10 businesses that build Kedaipal with us.
founding_ten_body_lead: First 10 paying Pro retailers lock in
founding_ten_body_highlight: 30% off for life — RM 104/mo Pro forever
founding_ten_body_tail: — plus a Founding Member badge, direct input on the roadmap, and white-glove onboarding. When the 10 spots are gone, they're gone.
founding_ten_remaining_label: Founding spots open — RM 104/mo Pro forever
founding_ten_benefit_1_body: RM 104/mo Pro — 30% off the standard rate, for as long as you stay subscribed. No renewals, no price hikes.
founding_ten_benefit_2_body: WhatsApp group with Arif. Roadmap input, feature requests, bugs — straight to the builder, no support queue.
founding_ten_benefit_3_body: Your business listed as a Kedaipal founding seller. The ones who were here on day one.
pricing_heading: One subscription. No per-message fees. No Meta setup.
pricing_sub: 14-day free trial on every plan. No credit card to start. Cancel anytime, export your data anytime.
pricing_no_lockin: Cancel anytime. Export your data anytime. No lock-in.
pricing_anchor: Most WhatsApp order tools charge RM 200–500/month for a fraction of what Kedaipal does. Starter from RM 79/mo — less than RM 3 a day.
pricing_future: Founding 10: the first 10 Pro retailers lock in RM 104/mo for life. {remaining} of 10 spots open.
cost_cta_heading: Calculate what WhatsApp is costing you
cost_cta_body: Missed orders + payment-chasing time, in ringgit. Takes 60 seconds.
faq_q_1: Do I need my own WhatsApp Business number?
faq_a_1: No — Kedaipal owns one Meta-verified WhatsApp Business Account that handles all outbound messaging. You don't need your own WABA, business verification, or SSM registration. Your store name appears in every message. Live in under 5 minutes.
faq_q_2: Do I need a registered company?
faq_a_2: No. Kedaipal handles all WhatsApp Business API access centrally — you never need to register with Meta. A registered company is not required to use Kedaipal.
faq_a_3: For MVP, Kedaipal supports offline payment methods: cash on delivery, bank transfer, and e-wallet screenshots. Online payment integration is on the roadmap.
faq_a_4: Kedaipal currently supports English and Bahasa Malaysia. Chinese and Tamil are on the roadmap.
faq_a_5: No. WhatsApp is where most sellers start because it's the channel their customers already use every day. Shopee, Lazada, and TikTok Shop connectors are on the roadmap — every channel will unify into one dashboard.
faq_q_6: What kinds of businesses is Kedaipal for?
faq_a_6: Kedaipal is built for any seller with a product catalog — F&B, fashion, beauty, handmade goods, home products, and more — taking 20+ orders a week on WhatsApp.
faq_a_7: You do. Every product, order, and customer record is yours. Export tools are available — CSV export is on the dashboard today.
faq_a_8: Yes — every plan starts with 14 days free, no credit card. You'll only be asked to pick a plan and add payment at the end of the trial. Cancel anytime in between and pay nothing.
faq_q_9: Will this work for me even if business is slow right now?
faq_a_9: When orders are slower, each missed follow-up costs more — not less. One recovered conversation this week could cover a month of subscription. Kedaipal makes sure none slip.
faq_a_10: A solo developer (Arif Rahman) building this with a small group of Malaysian home sellers as design partners. Active development, weekly updates, real human at the other end of the chat. Not a big team, but you'll always reach a person.
faq_q_11: I sell custom-made orders (cakes, printing) — can buyers approve a design first?
faq_a_11: Yes. Mark a product as needing mockup approval and its orders can't enter production until the buyer signs off. You upload the mockup, it goes out over WhatsApp, and the buyer approves or requests changes right on their tracking page. Payment is only asked for after approval — and if a buyer goes quiet, you can waive the gate after 48 hours.
final_heading: Stop losing orders buried in WhatsApp.
final_sub: 14-day free trial. No credit card. No Meta setup. Your storefront is live in 5 minutes.
footer_tagline: The shopkeeper's buddy. Made in SEA.
how_detail_1_desc: Your customer messages your WhatsApp Business number. No app download, no account creation — just a regular chat they already know how to use.
how_detail_1_chat_1: Hi! Do you have brownies available today?
how_detail_1_chat_2: Yes! Browse our full menu here 👇
how_detail_2_desc: Kedaipal sends a CTA button linking to your branded storefront at kedaipal.com/your-shop. Customers browse products, view photos, and check inventory — all on mobile.
how_detail_2_visual_alt: A Kedaipal storefront on a phone showing products with prices and an Add button
how_detail_3_heading: Customer adds to cart & sends order
how_detail_3_desc: Customers add items to cart directly in the browser. When they checkout, Kedaipal crafts a WhatsApp deep-link message that sends the full order back to your chat — no payment gateway needed for MVP.
how_detail_3_confirm: ✅ Got it! Order confirmed. We'll prepare it today.
how_detail_4_heading: Automated status updates keep them informed
how_detail_4_desc: As you update the order status in your dashboard (Confirmed → Packed → Shipped → Delivered), Kedaipal automatically messages the customer on WhatsApp. Zero manual follow-up.
phone_chat_1: Hi! Do you have brownies available today?
phone_chat_2: Yes! Browse our full menu here 👇
phone_chat_3: Got it, added a brownie box to cart 🛒

founding_perk_2_body: Your workflow shapes the roadmap. Founding members get a direct line to the builder.
founding_perk_3_body: Your business is featured as a Kedaipal founding seller — the ones who were here first.

cost_sub: Three quick guesses. We'll show you the monthly leak — honestly, even if it means you don't need us yet.
cost_missed_week: Orders you miss a week (your guess)
cost_disq_reassure: No pressure — we'll be here when it's worth it.
cost_result_lead: WhatsApp-only ordering is costing you about
cost_plug: Kedaipal costs RM{price}/mo to plug that leak — putting {savings} back in your pocket every month.
cost_disq_nomiss_body: You told us you're not missing any orders. Then there's nothing for Kedaipal to plug right now — and we won't pretend otherwise. If orders ever start slipping through WhatsApp chat, come back and run this again.

pricingpage_hero_sub: Try every Pro feature free for 14 days — no credit card, no Meta setup. When your trial ends, pick the plan that fits. Founding 10 members lock in RM 104/mo Pro for life.
pricingpage_tier_starter_tagline: For sellers just starting out — less than 50 orders/week. Covers the basics, nudges you to grow.
pricingpage_tier_pro_tagline: For an established single shop shipping weekly — 50–300 orders/week. The tier most home sellers grow into.
pricingpage_tier_scale_tagline: For suppliers & distributors running a reseller network — priced by your active resellers, not your order volume.
pricingpage_founding_detail: 30% off for life · {spots} spots remaining · locks in today's price permanently
pricingpage_band_note: An active reseller is one who placed at least 1 order that month.
pricingpage_banner_heading: 10 spots · 30% off for life · RM 104/mo Pro forever
pricingpage_banner_body: The first 10 sellers who build Kedaipal with us lock in RM 104/mo Pro pricing permanently — no renewals, no inflation. Direct line to the product roadmap.
pricingpage_faq_q1: Can I switch tiers as my orders grow?
pricingpage_faq_a1: Yes — upgrade in one tap from your dashboard, takes effect immediately with prorated billing. Downgrade takes effect at the end of your current billing period. You can also cancel anytime; your data is kept for 90 days.
pricingpage_faq_a2: Each order has a single pickup/delivery address. Multi-pickup-point routing — where a single order can have different pickup locations (e.g. multiple collection points for a batch run) — ships with Scale. It's on the S5 roadmap. (Team-member seats are coming soon.)
pricingpage_faq_q3: How does cold-chain Lalamove integration work?
pricingpage_faq_a3: Cold-chain Lalamove integration is on the roadmap for Scale-tier sellers. The integration will let you book a Lalamove van directly from a packed order in the dashboard — vehicle type, pickup time, and cold-chain flag — without switching tabs. ETA: Q4 2026. If this is critical for your operation, join as a Founding 10 member to influence the timeline.
pricingpage_faq_q4: What payment methods can my customers use?
pricingpage_faq_a4: Bank transfer, DuitNow QR, and e-wallet screenshot — all supported from day one. Online payment gateway (FPX, GrabPay, TNG) for shopper-to-retailer payments is on the S5 roadmap. Kedaipal never touches your order money — your gateway, your settlement.
pricingpage_faq_q5: How does the 14-day free trial work?
pricingpage_faq_a5: You get full access to Pro features for 14 days — no credit card to start. When the trial ends, pick the plan that fits (Starter, Pro, or Scale) to keep going. The first 10 sellers who choose Pro lock in RM 104/mo for life as Founding 10 members.
pricingpage_faq_q6: Does Kedaipal work if my customers are already chatting me on personal WhatsApp?
pricingpage_faq_a6: Yes. Your customers keep messaging whatever number they have for you. Kedaipal is a storefront + order system that connects via the CTA URL button in your WhatsApp Business profile — customers tap it, browse, cart, and the order comes back to you in WhatsApp. No app download, no new number.

pricingpage_no_lockin_note: Annual billing = 10 months paid, 12 received. Cancel anytime. Export your data anytime.
